---
title: "layer_norm"
generated: true
description: "LayerNorm over the trailing feature axis, with backend dispatch."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.nn.norm`](../nitrix-nn-norm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:layer_norm -->
```python
layer_norm(x: Float[Array, '... c'], weight: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, bias: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, *, eps: float = 1e-05, out_scale: float = 1.0, backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Float[Array, '... c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:layer_norm -->
LayerNorm over the trailing feature axis, with backend dispatch.

Standardises `x` over its trailing axis to zero mean and unit variance
(biased, dividing by the axis length), then applies the optional affine
transform and the depth-scaling factor. The output is
$\text{out\_scale} \cdot (\hat{x} \cdot \text{weight} +
\text{bias})$, where $\hat{x}$ is the standardised input; see the
[`reference_layer_norm`](../nitrix-nn-norm/reference_layer_norm.qmd) oracle for the exact recipe. The `out_scale`
factor is the curse-of-depth hook that folds constant depth-scaling schemes
in at zero marginal cost.

When the resolved backend is `pallas-cuda` the fused kernel is attempted;
if it cannot run for the given shape or host, the call falls back loudly to
the JAX reference.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:layer_norm -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `...` √ó `c` | ‚Äî | Input array; normalisation runs over the trailing channel axis `c`. |
| `weight` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-channel affine scale of shape `(c,)`. If omitted, no scaling is applied. |
| `bias` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-channel affine shift of shape `(c,)`. If omitted, no shift is applied. |
| `eps` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-05` | Constant added to the variance before the reciprocal square root, for numerical stability. |
| `out_scale` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | Depth-scaling multiplier applied to the full affine output. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Execution backend. `'auto'` resolves to `'pallas-cuda'` on a capable GPU and `'jax'` otherwise. |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `c`. The normalised, affine-transformed and depth-scaled array, with the same shape and dtype as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:layer_norm -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
